title: End Refurbished
body:
**This resourcepack overhauls the textures of the end. Enjoy vibrant new purpur, and unique end stone textures. **
Current pack includes:
- All vanilla end blocks re-textured (except end rods)
- Shulker, chorus fruits.
- Ender chest, Portal frame.
- Partial End Remastered Compat 12/16 eyes.
- Partial L_ender's Cataclysm compat (Does not include void/void-infused blocks, nor chorus planks.)![Barren landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c3d15d94563c9ec8274195199e6f2fe8d946735_0.webp)
